SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AKERS, DONALD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VOZIKES 2017, LLC. PATEL, SUE AVELLINO INVESTMENTS, LLC. SF ADMIN CODE 37.10B REQUIRES ME TO FIND BAD FAITH BY THE LANDLORD BEFORE AWARDING DAMAGES. I FIND NO BAD FAITH BUT INSTEAD A DIFFICULT LANDLORD-TENANT RELATIONSHIP. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY AKERS, DONALD AS TO DEFENDANT VOZIKES 2017, LLC. PATEL, SUE AVELLINO INVESTMENTS, LLC. AMPHORA INVESTMENTS, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-28-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF DONALD AKERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VOZIKES 2017, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY LOUIS VOZIKES, OWNER. DEFENDANT AVELLINO INVESTMENTS, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CYNTHIA VLAHOS, OWNER. DEFENDANT SUE PATEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMPHORA INVESTMENTS, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT'S AVELLINO INVESTMENTS, LLC & AMPHORA INVESTMENTS LLC. DEFENDANT AVELLINO INVESTMENTS LLC WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS TO DISMISS DEFENDANT AMPHORA INVESTMENTS LLC FROM HIS CLAIM. PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
